name: Windfall in the Woods
description: A storm-felled oak lies just outside the gate, dry and ready for splitting.

name: Bandit Raid
description: Bandits strike at dawn, ladders against the walls and torches in hand.

choices.label: Meet them on the walls
choices.description: Blood for blood.

choices.label: Buy them off
choices.description: Treasure is cheaper than funerals.

choices.label: Hide and endure
choices.description: Let them take what they find outside the walls.

name: Plague Outbreak
description: Fever spreads through the quarters. Coughing echoes in the night.

choices.label: Quarantine the sick
choices.description: Harsh, but it stops the spread.

choices.label: Trust the healers
choices.description: If you have healers, they will earn their keep tonight.

name: Desertion Threat
description: Whispers in the barracks: some speak openly of leaving.

choices.label: Promise better rations
choices.description: Full bellies buy loyalty, for a while.

choices.label: Give a speech
choices.description: Words cost nothing. Sometimes they work.

choices.label: Let them go
choices.description: Better gone than grumbling.

name: Noble's Demand
description: A rider in fine livery delivers a sealed demand: tribute, in the name of Lord Vexley.

choices.label: Pay the tribute
choices.description: Swallow your pride, keep the peace.

choices.label: Refuse
choices.description: This fortress bows to no one.

name: Refugees at the Gate
description: A ragged column of refugees begs entry — a burned village behind them.

choices.label: Open the gates
choices.description: More mouths, more hands.

choices.label: Turn them away
choices.description: Charity starves the giver.

name: Master Smith Passes Through
description: A master smith examines your forge and clicks her tongue. "I could make this proper."

choices.label: Build the Blacksmith
choices.description: Better arms — your people take less harm in battle.

choices.label: Decline
choices.description: The forge works well enough.

name: Infirmary Plans
description: The healers draft plans for a proper infirmary — beds, herbs, clean water.

choices.label: Build the Infirmary
choices.description: Disasters strike half as hard.

choices.label: Shelve the plans
choices.description: Herbs and prayers will have to do.

name: Granary Construction
description: A stone granary would keep the stores safe from rot, rats, and raiders.

choices.label: Build the Granary
choices.description: Opens trade routes; safer stores.

choices.label: Not now
choices.description: Stone is scarce.

name: Barracks Construction
description: The guards sleep in the stables. A proper barracks would draw better soldiers.

choices.label: Build the Barracks
choices.description: +5 max population, +2 defense.

choices.label: The stables suffice
choices.description: Soldiers have slept in worse.

name: Trade Caravan
description: Word of your granary has spread. A wealthy caravan offers serious trade.

choices.label: Sell grain in bulk
choices.description: Their goods are fine and their scales are honest.

choices.label: Buy provisions
choices.description: Stock up at fair prices.

choices.label: Just trade news
choices.description: Information is free.

name: Scout Report
description: From the watchtower, a scout spots movement in the hills — you have warning, this time.

choices.label: Prepare an ambush
choices.description: Turn their surprise against them.

choices.label: Reinforce the walls
choices.description: Let them break against stone.

name: Festival of Lights
description: The old festival falls due. The people look to you, hopeful.

choices.label: Hold the festival
choices.description: Lanterns, music, and a night without fear.

choices.label: Cancel it
choices.description: These are not days for feasting.

name: Mine Collapse
description: A tunnel under the east slope gives way with workers inside.

choices.label: Dig them out
choices.description: Every hand to the rubble.

choices.label: Seal the tunnel
choices.description: It's too dangerous. May they rest.

name: Mercenary Offer
description: A scarred captain offers her company's swords — for a price.

choices.label: Hire them
choices.description: Steel you can count, loyalty you can't.

choices.label: Refuse politely
choices.description: Sellswords cut both ways.

name: Thieves in the Night
description: Someone has been at the strongbox. The lock is scratched, the count short.

choices.label: Post extra watches
choices.description: Guards lose sleep; thieves lose nerve.

choices.label: Let it go
choices.description: Whoever it was, they needed it more.

name: Romance in the Keep
description: Two of your people are to be wed. The whole fortress is talking.

choices.label: Host the wedding
choices.description: Joy is rare; spend on it.

choices.label: A quiet blessing
choices.description: Congratulate them and move on.

name: Wandering Brewer
description: A barrel-laden cart rolls through the gate. The brewer eyes your empty common room and offers to stay — for the price of a roof.

choices.label: Raise the Tavern
choices.description: A hearth, a hall, and song every night.

choices.label: Send him on
choices.description: There are graver needs than ale.

name: The Tinker's Bench
description: A travelling tinker lays out files, lasts, and clamps. With a proper workshop, she says, your people could make their own tools.

choices.label: Raise the Workshop
choices.description: Tools beget tools.

choices.label: Not now
choices.description: The timber is needed elsewhere.

name: The Old Grove
description: Your foresters find a stand of straight, sound timber within a day's haul. Clear a yard for it and the wood will keep coming.

choices.label: Raise the Lumberyard
choices.description: Steady timber, day after day.

choices.label: Leave the grove be
choices.description: Some woods are best left standing.

name: A Sign in the Dark
description: The healers report restless dreams and a chill that does not lift. They ask for a shrine — a place to set faith against whatever gathers beyond the walls.

choices.label: Raise the Shrine
choices.description: Faith is a wall the dark cannot climb.

choices.label: Dismiss the talk
choices.description: Dreams are only dreams.

name: The Old Sergeant
description: A grizzled veteran among the guard offers to drill the others if you'll clear a yard for it. Sweat now, he says, or blood later.

choices.label: Raise the Training Yard
choices.description: Sharpen the guard, day by day.

choices.label: They drill enough
choices.description: Let the walls do the teaching.
